Hardware Component File

N_PZ1A_SCU_UDS_PT_20210823

System Identification and Configuration Data

Metadata

File reference N_PZ1A_SCU_UDS_PT_20210823_20210824T021136.json
Source type JSON Data Array
Status
Validated

Technical Warning

Ensure specific OBD protocol matching before hardware implementation to avoid controller lockout.

Safety Guidelines →

OBD Configuration Details

Protocol CAN
Baudrate 10400
Send ID 79D
Receive ID 7BD
Functional Addr 4D
Functional Name SCU
